briefdescription.para: Platform supported multiple input devices number of one ISP.
Maximum betch mode support frame number.
Enumeration type to configure the enable mask for ISP output path.

detaileddescription.para: The output mask for main path

briefdescription.para: The output mask for self path 1.
The output mask for self path 2.
The output mask for raw path.
The output mask for HDR raw path.
VsCamDevice lock types for the auto algorithms.
Stream mode: input device connects ISP pipeline directly.
MCM mode: input device connects MCM.
RDMA mode: input from DMA buffer.
Enumeration type to configure the work mode of one input device.
Enumeration type to configure the input type of ISP pipeline.
ISP hardware output image into extra memory.
ISP hardware output image into next process module directly.
ISP hardware bpth output image into memory and next process module.
Enumeration type to configure the output type of ISP pipeline.
Enumeration type to specify the swap control.
Enumeration type to specify the order of YUV or RGB channel Right now only surpport RGB888 format.
HW split image operation(need HW mp_ctrl support).
Enumeration type to configure the tile operation mode for tile mode.
User defined joint in x axis and y axis.
Enumeration type to configure the tile joint mode.
Enumeration type to configure the tile x axis when joint mode is user-defined(CAMDEV_TILE_JOINT_USER).
Enumeration type to configure the tile y axis when joint mode is user-defined(CAMDEV_TILE_JOINT_USER).
Invalid video in MCM invalid port index.
Video input MCM max port index.
Enumeration type to configure the MCM port index and the VI200 adapter port index.
Enumeration type to configure the MCM operation mode for MCM mode.
Enumeration type to configure the MCM selection for MCM mode.
Enumeration type to configure the register mode for MCM mode.

detaileddescription.para: The switch control layer will schedule each camera device according to the sequence priority.

briefdescription.para: Enumeration type to configure the sequence mode of switch control.
Enumeration type to configure the sequence priority in switch control.
Main path of ISP hardware pipeline.
Self path 1 of ISP hardware pipeline.
Self path 2 of ISP hardware pipeline.
Main path for RAW image output.
Retiming HDR path for RAW image output.
Enumeration type to configure the output path.
Enumeration type to configure input path channel.
Enumeration type to configure the bit depth of input pixel.
ISP output format: YUV422 Semi-Planar in align mode 0.
ISP output format: YUV422 Semi-Planar in align mode 1.
ISP output format: YUV422 Interleaved in align mode 1.
ISP output format: YUV420 Semi-Planar in align mode 0.
ISP output format: YUV420 Semi-Planar in align mode 1.
ISP output format: YUV444 Interleaved in align mode 0.
ISP output format: YUV400 Y only format.
ISP output format: YUV400 Y only format in align mode 0.
ISP output format: YUV400 Y only format in align mode 1.
ISP output format: RGB888 Raster Scan.
ISP output format: RGB888 Raster Scan in align mode 0.
ISP output format: Raw 10-bit in align mode 0.
ISP output format: Raw 10-bit in align mode 1.
ISP output format: Raw 12-bit in align mode 0.
ISP output format: Raw 12-bit in align mode 1.
ISP output format: Raw 14-bit in align mode 0.
ISP output format: Raw 14-bit in align mode 1.
Enumeration type to configure format of output pixel.
RAW20 compressed, only for 8200/8000 HDR mode.
RAW24 compressed, only for 8200 HDR mode.
DOL2 frame or 1 CG+VS sx12-bit RAW.
VsCamDevice lock types for the auto algorithms.
Enumeration type to configure the work mode of one input device.
Enumeration type to configure the input type of ISP pipeline.
Enumeration type to configure the output type of ISP pipeline.
Enumeration type to specify the swap control.
Union type to specify the RAW and YUV swap mode.
Enumeration type to specify the order of YUV or RGB channel Right now only surpport RGB888 format.
Structure type to specify the RAW and YUV buffer offset.
Structure type to specify the RAW and YUV buffer stride.
Enumeration type to configure the tile operation mode for tile mode.
Enumeration type to configure the tile joint mode.
Enumeration type to configure the tile x axis when joint mode is user-defined(CAMDEV_TILE_JOINT_USER).
Enumeration type to configure the tile y axis when joint mode is user-defined(CAMDEV_TILE_JOINT_USER).
Enumeration type to configure the MCM port index and the VI200 adapter port index.
Enumeration type to configure the MCM port index for stream mode.
Enumeration type to configure the MCM operation mode for MCM mode.
Enumeration type to configure the MCM selection for MCM mode.
Enumeration type to configure the register mode for MCM mode.
Enumeration type to configure the sequence mode of switch control.
Enumeration type to configure the sequence priority in switch control.
Enumeration type to configure the output path.
Enumeration type to configure input path channel.
Enumeration type to configure the bit depth of input pixel.
Enumeration type to configure format of output pixel.
